name: proyectos-hub
description: Hub central de los proyectos full-stack de Isergioam

scripts.install:all: npm run install:cacherunner && npm run install:codeinvaders && npm run install:documentos && npm run install:fitquest && npm run install:prestamos && npm run install:recetas && npm run install:tienda
scripts.install:cacherunner: npm install --prefix CacheRunner/frontend && npm install --prefix CacheRunner/backend
scripts.install:codeinvaders: npm install --prefix CodeInvaders/frontend && npm install --prefix CodeInvaders/backend
scripts.install:documentos: npm install --prefix Documentos/frontend-documentos && npm install --prefix Documentos/backend-documentos
scripts.install:fitquest: npm install --prefix FitQuest/frontend && npm install --prefix FitQuest/backend
scripts.install:prestamos: npm install --prefix Prestamos/frontend && npm install --prefix Prestamos/backend
scripts.install:recetas: npm install --prefix Recetas/frontend-recetas && npm install --prefix Recetas/backend-recetas
scripts.install:tienda: npm install --prefix Tienda/frontend-tienda && npm install --prefix Tienda/backend-tienda
scripts.dev:cacherunner: concurrently -n "frontend,backend" -c "cyan,green" "npm run dev --prefix CacheRunner/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix CacheRunner/backend"
scripts.dev:codeinvaders: concurrently -n "frontend,backend" -c "cyan,green" "npm run dev --prefix CodeInvaders/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix CodeInvaders/backend"
scripts.dev:documentos: concurrently -n "frontend,backend" -c "cyan,green" "npm run dev --prefix Documentos/frontend-documentos" "npm run dev --prefix Documentos/backend-documentos"
scripts.dev:fitquest: concurrently -n "frontend,backend" -c "cyan,green" "npm run dev --prefix FitQuest/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix FitQuest/backend"
scripts.dev:prestamos: concurrently -n "frontend,backend" -c "cyan,green" "npm run dev --prefix Prestamos/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix Prestamos/backend"
scripts.dev:recetas: concurrently -n "frontend,backend" -c "cyan,green" "npm run dev --prefix Recetas/frontend-recetas" "npm run dev --prefix Recetas/backend-recetas"
scripts.dev:tienda: concurrently -n "frontend,backend" -c "cyan,green" "npm run dev --prefix Tienda/frontend-tienda" "npm run dev --prefix Tienda/backend-tienda"
